narrative:
Precinct Newcomerstown #2 (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 676 registered voters, with 65.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.1 percentage points.
